item.title: About
item.author: bbhtt.zn0i8@slmail.me (bbhtt)
item.description: I’m Nobody! Who are you? Are you – Nobody – too? Then there’s a pair of us! ~ Emily Dickinson Tech support person and occasional contributor seen online around various FOSS communities, Ph.D. student in Mathematics Personal details Hello, my name is Boudhayan Bhattacharya but I usually go by the alias bbhtt online. I live in India. I completed my Bachelors (Honours) in Mathematics in June 2021 with 83.66% marks and I completed my Masters in Mathematics in June 2023 with 80.
